<!--
AUTHORSHIP (REQUIRED for human-token attribution).

The central service account is the git committer for all team work, so GitHub
attributes every commit/PR to it. To credit the real human(s), the daily data
sync parses the block below. Replace the placeholders with the real author's
handle + the git email registered as their edge8 team member, then UNCOMMENT it
(remove the surrounding <!-- ... -->). The `<email>` is the resolution key.

Format (the sync matches /<!--\s*author:\s*(\S+)\s+(\S+)\s*-->/):

  <!-- author: <handle> <email> -->
  <!-- co-authors: <handle> <email>, <handle> <email> -->   (optional)

Example:

  <!-- author: luke luke.dinh@edge8.ai -->
-->
<!-- author: <handle> <email> -->
